details.test: Task 1: $50 one-time donation to Library Books Drive with dedication
Task 2: $35 one-time donation to filtered classroom-style campaign
Task 3: $15 monthly recurring donation to General Fund (6 months)
Task 4: $45 one-time donation to Alex Rivera with public message
Task 5: $25 one-time donation to earliest ending campaign in next 7 days
Task 6: Sponsorship at cheapest qualifying level (gym banner if available)
Task 7: $60 combined cart donation split across two campaigns ($35 + $25)
Task 8: $100 one-time donation to Athletics with 'NOFEE' promo and no fee coverage
Task 9: $120 pledge as 3 monthly installments of $40 for Technology Upgrade
